prompt: Create a dark gothic oil painting portrait in a decayed aristocratic vampire aesthetic. The composition shows exactly 2 figures: a seated young woman in the lower left foreground and a tall elegant man standing or leaning behind her on the right. Both faces are deliberately obscured by flat, opaque dark-brown rectangular censor blocks, one rectangle centered over the man’s face and one narrower vertical rectangle over the woman’s face. The man is tall and gaunt with pale skin, long messy black hair with deep crimson streaks, ornate gold hair jewelry and chains near his temple, a visible pointed ear with dangling earrings, layered gold necklaces, and a black velvet coat over a dark red open-collar shirt. His right hand rests in the lower right foreground, thin and skeletal, wearing a red bracelet with a dangling gold key charm. The woman has pale skin, shoulder-length wet-looking black hair, bare shoulders, a black lace off-shoulder dress with a low neckline, a small gold pendant necklace, and a bouquet of dark red roses at the bottom left. Place her in an antique red-and-gold chair while the man looms protectively behind her. The background is a shadowy old interior with a tarnished gold frame or mirror edge on the left and deep red drapery on the right. Use a moody chiaroscuro palette of black, umber, burgundy, tarnished gold, and sickly pale flesh tones, with thick painterly brush texture, high detail, romantic horror atmosphere, Victorian decadence, and no visible text. Overall mood: beautiful, ominous, intimate, and cursed.
